It was informed that, the above applications for GNA by M/s Ambuja Cement & M/s ACC Limited were discussed in the 32nd CMETS NR meeting held on 10.07.2024
RE
wherein M/s Ambuja Cement & M/s ACC Limited had informed that they have realigned their project for the GNA with revised start date from 01.09.2024 & end
RE
date to 31.03.2026. Regarding this, CTUIL informed that the validity of NoC submitted by the M/s ACC & M/s Ambuja are only till 30.06.2025. Therefore, in case they
wish to change their end date to 31.03.2026, the revised NoC upto 31.03.2026 from STU needs to be submitted. M/s Ambuja & M/s ACC informed that they are in
the process of obtaining revised NoC from STU. Accordingly, it was decided that the above applications shall be again

bmitted by the M/s ACC & M/s Ambuja are only till 30.06.2025. Therefore, in case they
wish to change their end date to 31.03.2026, the revised NoC upto 31.03.2026 from STU needs to be submitted. M/s Ambuja & M/s ACC informed that they are in
the process of obtaining revised NoC from STU. Accordingly, it was decided that the above applications shall be again taken up for discussion in the next CMETS
NR meeting. M/s Ambuja Cement & M/s ACC need to submit revised NoC before 33rd CMETS NR meeting.

4 Drawee entity connected to Intra 0 25 25 01.06.2024 30.06.2025

01.09.2024) 31.03.2026)
It was informed that, M/s Ambuja Cements Limited has applied for GNA of 25 MW (Outside the region) as a drawee entity connected to Intra State Transmission
RE
System of RVPNL at 132kV GSS Mundawa. As agreed in the 32nd CMETS NR meeting, M/s Ambuja Cement vide mail dated 15.07.2024 submitted the revised NoC
from RVPN with validity from 01.09.2024 upto 31.03.2026.
It was informed that Rajasthan has been granted GNA of 5755 MW as per 18.1 of Connectivity & GNA regulations 2022. There is sufficient margin available in the
existing ISTS system for drawl of additional 25 MW from ISTS periphery of Rajasthan (RVPN) network. In view of the above, it was agreed to grant 25 MW of GNA
RE
(outside the region) to Ambuja Cements with Start date from 01.09.2024.
